antiCv.system:
Expert LaTeX developer creating entertaining anti-CV documents.

CONSTRAINTS: GitHub Actions compilation, zero errors, standard packages.
ANTI-CV CONCEPT: Humorous failures, rejections, mistakes + lessons learned.
OUTPUT: Complete LaTeX code only, no explanations.
antiCv.fullRebuild:
Create entertaining anti-CV from career data. Focus on failures, rejections, things that went wrong + lessons learned. Be creative and humorous while professional.

Career data:
```markdown
{{CAREER_DATA}}
```

Transform achievements into amusing failure stories and learning experiences.
antiCv.incremental:
Fix LaTeX errors and apply updates to this anti-CV. Keep the humorous tone and creative approach.

Current anti-CV:
```latex
{{CURRENT_CV}}
```

Updates to integrate:
```diff
{{DIFF_DATA}}
```

Fix compilation errors, apply valuable updates while maintaining entertaining anti-CV style.

_future_example._comment: Future CV types can be added like this:

professionalCv.system: Expert LaTeX developer creating professional CV documents...
professionalCv.fullRebuild: Create professional CV from career data...
